name: mesh-gradient-surface
title: Mesh Gradient Surface
description: A mesh gradient surface gives a hero, brand section, or empty backdrop an organic multi-point color field without imagery. Tier ① (CSS-only) in `knowledge/expressive-stack.md`: several radial-gradient layers stacked on one element approximate a mesh — no JS, no dependency, static by default. Use it where a flat token background feels inert but a photo or 3D scene would be overkill.
docs: Recipe contract (intent/anatomy/tokens/checks/anti-patterns): https://ui.askewly.com/llms/recipes/marketing/mesh-gradient-surface.md — after transplant, remap look to the project's own tokens per https://ui.askewly.com/llms/docs/design-system/component-restyle.md
